articles.title: The Core Ultra 7 270K was too good, so Intel scrapped the flagship Core Ultra 9 290K Plus — benchmarks of the 290K prototype find slim 2% faster performance in gaming and applications
articles.summary: The Core Ultra 9 290K Plus, which never came out, was only marginally faster than the Core Ultra 7 270K Plus, which explains why Intel ultimately chose not to release it. On average across 1080p and 1440p games, it's only about 2% faster, and in synthetic benchmarks and productivity workloads, it's less than 4% ahead.
articles.title_zh: Core Ultra 7 270K 表現太強，Intel 取消旗艦 Core Ultra 9 290K Plus — 290K 原型機基準測試顯示遊戲和應用效能僅快 2%
articles.summary_zh: 從未發售的 Core Ultra 9 290K Plus 相比 Core Ultra 7 270K Plus 效能提升有限，平均遊戲效能僅快約 2%，這解釋了 Intel 最終決定不發布該產品的原因。

articles.title: These are the best new MacBook deals right now: May 2026 Buyer’s Guide
articles.summary: In the era of Apple Silicon, MacBooks are more affordable than ever. Nowadays, you can buy a MacBook Air with 512GB of storage and 16GB of memory for $1099 directly from Apple, when such a configuration would’ve cost $1599 just a few years ago. And on top of that, we have MacBook Neo bringing the entry-point down substantially. Even with Apple’s prices coming down though, there’s still a number of deals to be found out there if you look just a little. more…
articles.title_zh: 現在最好的 MacBook 優惠：2026年5月買家指南
articles.summary_zh: 在 Apple Silicon 時代，MacBook 變得前所未有的平價；現在可直接從 Apple 購買配備 512GB 儲存和 16GB 記憶體的 MacBook Air，售價僅 $1099，而數年前同樣配置需要 $1599。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Cats Lock’ is a fun Mac app that solves cat keyboard spam
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . If you’re a beloved cat owner, you might often have your cat running across your Mac’s keyboard, causing loads of unnecessary keyboard input, and sometimes even unwanted communications. Cats Lock has a solution for it, and soon your cat will be able to roam your MacBook keyboard freely. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用焦點：'Cats Lock' 是解決貓咪鍵盤亂踩的趣味 Mac 應用
articles.summary_zh: Cats Lock 是 Indie App Spotlight 系列的週間精選應用；如果你是貓咪飼主，可能經常遇到貓咪在 Mac 鍵盤上亂走導致的問題。

articles.title: Apple Watch Series 12: Here’s what we know so far
articles.summary: As is the case every year, this September – Apple will be unveiling its next-generation Apple Watch model. Apple Watch Series 12 will likely carry on the same design language as the Apple Watch Series 11, but with a few changes. Let’s dive in. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple Watch Series 12：目前我們所知的情報
articles.summary_zh: Apple Watch Series 12 預計將於今年9月發佈，可能延續 Apple Watch Series 11 的設計語言但會有若干改進。

articles.title: How to remove your personal data from the internet (and why you can’t afford to wait)
articles.summary: Data brokers make a living by selling your personal information for profit. Your phone number, email, home address, and Social Security number could be packaged and sold to spammers, scammers, and identity thieves right now. Your privacy loss is their gain. Apple’s privacy protections can help block some but not all tracking as data harvesting efforts become increasingly sophisticated. If you want to proactively and continuously remove your personal data from broker databases, Incogni makes it easier than ever to fight back and regain control of your privacy. more…
articles.title_zh: 如何從網際網路上移除你的個人資料（以及為什麼你不能再等待）
articles.summary_zh: 資料仲介靠販售你的個人資訊牟利，你的電話號碼、電子郵件、住址和社會安全號碼可能現在就被打包出售給垃圾郵件發送者、詐騙犯和身分盜竊者。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [May 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages. more…
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 新增功能推出情況 [2026年5月]
articles.summary_zh: 與其他 Google 應用類似，Messages for Android 進行許多 A/B 測試；RCS/SMS 客戶端推出新功能的時間通常較長。

articles.title: Wondering where your OxygenOS update is? OnePlus quietly hit pause
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR OnePlus has paused the rollout of OxygenOS version 16.0.7.XXX and 16.0.5.XXX. The rollout was paused due to devices experiencing abnormal restart and boot issues. The rollout will resume after the issue is fixed and the builds are validated for stability and reliability. OnePlus recently began rolling out an OxygenOS update. If you’re wondering why it’s still not available for your OnePlus device, it’s because the rollout was paused. However, it shouldn’t be long before the rollout resumes. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 想知道你的 OxygenOS 更新在哪？OnePlus 悄悄暫停了推出
articles.summary_zh: OnePlus 已暫停 OxygenOS 版本 16.0.7.XXX 和 16.0.5.XXX 的推出，因為設備出現異常重啟和啟動問題。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Motorola Razr 70 / 2026 series is overpriced, needs more updates
articles.summary: Last week, we asked you to vote on the topic of Motorola’s new flip foldables – the Razr 70 series or, as they are known in the US, the Razr 2026 series. While there are three models involved, we can come to only one conclusion. And that conclusion is that the new flip foldables are too expensive – each of the three (vanilla, plus and Ultra) has its fans, however, it would take a price cut or some other deal before most people would consider buying one. Let’s look at them individually. The Motorola Razr 70 Ultra (aka Razr Ultra 2026) has the best shot – 15% of the vote went in its favor...
articles.title_zh: 週投票結果：Motorola Razr 70 / 2026 系列價格過高，需要更多更新
articles.summary_zh: 上週投票結果顯示，Motorola 新款折疊式手機 Razr 70 系列（美國稱為 Razr 2026 系列）的價格過於昂貴。

articles.title: Google’s new Gemini Intelligence will only be available on a handful of the best current Android flagships for now
articles.summary: A few days ago, Google announced Gemini Intelligence, which seems to be more than just a rebranding effort. It’s actually an impressive set of features that, among other things, can automate multi-step tasks and execute them entirely in the background on its own, including things like sourcing and transforming information and interacting with various apps and websites autonomously on your behalf. There is even a “Rambler” component coming to Gboard that lets you talk freely with any and all filler or crutch words that most of us unintentionally use, and even mix languages in the same...
articles.title_zh: Google 新推出的 Gemini Intelligence 目前僅限部分頂級 Android 旗艦機使用
articles.summary_zh: Google 宣佈的 Gemini Intelligence 不僅是重新命名，而是一套令人印象深刻的功能集合，可自動執行多步驟任務並在背景獨立運行。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A54 starts receiving May 2026 security patches before its flagship siblings
articles.summary: This is a rather interesting development for sure, but for whatever reason, Samsung has already shipped an update containing Android’s May security patches to the Galaxy A55 and is now doing the same for the Galaxy A54. Meanwhile, this author’s personal Galaxy S26 Ultra is still running patches from April 5 as of writing this article. We snooped around in the changelog for the update just out of curiosity. Perhaps something in there would simply be more relevant in some way to the midrange Galaxy A5x family? That doesn’t appear to be the case. The May patches address two critical...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy A54 在旗艦機之前率先收到 2026年5月安全補丁
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 已向 Galaxy A55 推送包含 Android 5月安全補丁的更新，現在也開始為 Galaxy A54 提供同樣更新。

articles.title: Weekly deals: the Galaxy S26 series is on sale, Motorola Razr 2026 series goes on pre-order
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy S26+ (256GB) is currently $890 on Amazon – that’s a bit lower than we’ve seen it at for the past few weeks and $200+ off on a phone that’s less than three months old is a solid discount. That said, the 2026 model doesn’t bring many updates over its predecessor – there’s the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 and the slightly faster wireless charging (20W vs. 15W, though still without magnets). Meanwhile, many flagship features are still missing, things like a high resolution sensor in the telephoto camera, 10-bit colors for the display or an IP69 rating (though that last one is...
articles.title_zh: 週間優惠：Galaxy S26 系列降價，Motorola Razr 2026 系列開放預訂
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26+ (256GB) 目前在 Amazon 售價 $890，比近數週價格更低，對於發售不足三個月的新機來說優惠不錯。

articles.title: Google reveals why it's offering only 5GB free storage instead of 15GB with some new Gmail accounts
articles.summary: We recently saw reports from users claiming that Google is offering only 5GB of free storage with a new Gmail account, instead of 15GB, but if they added their phone number to the new account, Google would "unlock" 15GB storage at no cost. Google has revealed the reason behind that. In a statement to Android Authority, a Google spokesperson said the company is testing this change to help it continue to provide a "high-quality storage service" to its users. New Gmail account with 5GB storage "We’re testing a new storage policy for new accounts created in select regions that will...
articles.title_zh: Google 揭露為何部分新 Gmail 帳戶僅提供 5GB 免費儲存而非 15GB
articles.summary_zh: Google 解釋了為何某些新 Gmail 帳戶只提供 5GB 而非 15GB 的免費儲存；若用戶新增電話號碼，Google 會「解鎖」15GB 免費儲存空間。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S24 series, Fold6, and Flip6 are receiving One UI 8.5 stable update in the US
articles.summary: The One UI 8.5 stable update released by Samsung for the Galaxy S24 series, Galaxy Z Fold6, and Galaxy Z Flip6 globally earlier this week is now rolling out in the US. [#InlinePriceWidget,13147,1#] [#InlinePriceWidget,12771,1#] The update comes with firmware versions S928USQU5DZDR for the Galaxy S24 Ultra, S721USQUBDZDP for the Galaxy S24 FE, F956USQU3DZDQ for the Galaxy Z Fold6, and F741USQU3DZDP for the Galaxy Z Flip6. The One UI 8.5 stable update is also reportedly rolling out in the US for the Galaxy S24 and Galaxy S24+, but their firmware versions aren't known. Samsung...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy S24 系列、Fold6 和 Flip6 在美國接收 One UI 8.5 穩定版更新
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy S24 系列、Galaxy Z Fold6 和 Galaxy Z Flip6 的 One UI 8.5 穩定版更新已在美國開始推出。

articles.title: Selfie video blind test reveal: the Samsung Galaxy A37 wins a decisive victory
articles.summary: A week ago, we asked you to participate in a selfie video blind test. We lined up five phones, and we let you vote which one had the best selfie video quality. These five phones were not chosen randomly; we picked those specifically because their selfie videos had already surprised us during review time. And you will see what we mean when you see their names. We collected our readers' opinion on the quality of these videos across several platforms, including our TikTok channel, Instagram, YouTube and a poll on our homepage. The winner and the loser are quite clear now – and surprisingly,...
articles.title_zh: 自拍影片盲測揭曉：Samsung Galaxy A37 獲得決定性勝利
articles.summary_zh: 一週前的自拍影片盲測中，我們為五部手機進行投票比較自拍影片質量，Samsung Galaxy A37 最終獲得決定性勝利。

articles.title: Santa Clara County Sues Meta Over Alleged Scam Ads
articles.title_zh: Santa Clara 縣起訴 Meta 涉嫌詐騙廣告

articles.title: ★ AI Is Technology, Not a Product
articles.summary: It’s not even a feature. It’s just technology.
articles.title_zh: ★ AI 是技術，不是產品

articles.title: ArXiv to Ban Researchers for a Year if They Submit AI Slop
articles.title_zh: ArXiv 將禁止提交 AI 垃圾內容的研究人員一年

articles.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
articles.summary: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.
articles.title_zh: AI 淘金熱中的幸運兒與失利者
articles.summary_zh: 儘管在科技產業內，當前 AI 繁榮的氛圍也不甚樂觀。

articles.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
articles.summary: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.
articles.title_zh: 研究存儲庫 ArXiv 將禁止讓 AI 完成所有工作的作者一年
articles.summary_zh: ArXiv 正在加強對科學論文中大語言模型草率使用的打擊。

articles.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
articles.summary: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 聯合創辦人 Greg Brockman 掌管產品策略
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 的最新重組到來之際，該公司據稱計劃整合 ChatGPT 和其編程產品 Codex。

articles.title: ASML Partners With Tata Electronics to Advance India Chip Plans
articles.summary: ASML Holding NV entered into a partnership agreement with Tata Electronics Private Limited aimed at ramping up India’s goal to develop domestic chip-manufacturing capabilities.
articles.title_zh: ASML 與 Tata Electronics 合作推進印度芯片計劃
articles.summary_zh: ASML Holding NV 與 Tata Electronics Private Limited 簽訂合作協議，旨在推進印度發展國內芯片製造能力的目標。

articles.title: AI Poised to Tilt Job Market Leverage Toward Older Workers
articles.summary: When it comes to job cuts, older workers are often disproportionately affected. But a new survey of chief executive officers suggests this won’t be a given as companies adopt artificial intelligence.
articles.title_zh: AI 可能改變就業市場對年長員工的話語權
articles.summary_zh: 儘管年長員工在裁員中往往受到不成比例的影響，但首席執行官的最新調查表明，隨著企業採用人工智能，這種情況可能不再必然發生。

articles.title: 微軟揭露Exchange Server存在8.1分重大漏洞，並已偵測到漏洞利用活動
